author: tmiychao
content:
Regarding project proposals and presentations -  we are now in middle of week 4 and it's time to gather everything your prepared so far into a project proposal. 

Please open a PR to add your project based on the template in `/projects` directory and use the second table in dev updates file that has dedicated cells for links to your projects. You can open draft, send it to me for initial feedback first but I will do one final review always before merging. 
Check out project proposals from previous years for inspiration of course but generally recommendations are same as when writing updates - be clear, get to the point, provide explanations not just outcomes. The template guide should give the idea what to work on, the core is bsacially the motivation to explain what you learned in the first phase and then specs actually outlining what you are aiming to achieve. 

Next week's office hours will be first opportunity to present your projects. If you feel ready, you can sign up here and plan your presentation. It's only few minutes basically explaining what you written in your proposal - what came out of your initial research, what is your solution, without too much context about the domain itself but focusing on your actual proposed solution, slides don't have to be nothing fancy
https://github.com/eth-protocol-fellows/cohort-seven/issues/156
